heading: Seal
label: 608 Seal
text: The Director shall use a seal approved by the Supreme Court. Judicial notice shall be taken of such seal.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on title 28, U.S.C., 1940 ed., § 444 (, as added , ).Mar. 3, 1911, ch. 231, § 302Aug. 7, 1939, ch. 501, § 153 Stat. 1223This section contains a part of , U.S.C., 1940 ed. The remainder of said section 444 is incorporated in sections 601, 603 and 606 of this title.section 444 of title 28Changes were made in phraseology.
